scripts.check:tw: powershell -Command "$matches = Get-ChildItem -Recurse -Path src -Include *.tsx,*.ts,*.jsx,*.js | Select-String -Pattern '\[[^\]]+\]'; if ($matches) { Write-Output '❌ Tailwind arbitrary values found:'; $matches | ForEach-Object { Write-Output ($_.Path + ':' + $_.LineNumber + ' -> ' + $_.Line.Trim()) }; exit 1 } else { Write-Output '✅ Tailwind clean' }"
